title: Doff Slug & Snail Killer | 400g Garden Slug Pellets | Ferric Phosphate Formula for Effective Slug and Snail Control | Long-Lasting Protection in Damp Conditions for Up to 14 Days - Safe for Crops
features: EFFECTIVE SLUG PROTECTION: Keep your garden safe with Doff Slug & Snail Killer pellets. Ready to use, these pellets provide up to 14 days of protection, even in wet weather, ensuring your fruits, vegetables, and flowers stay protected.

RELIABLE PEST BARRIER: Spread pellets around plant bases to form a strong defense against slugs and snails. For optimal results, apply in the evening or early morning, particularly in damp conditions when slugs are most active. These blue pellets offer dependable protection from pest damage.

PROTECT & PROMOTE GROWTH: These ferric phosphate pellets eliminate slugs while keeping your garden safe and thriving. Safe for use around edible crops and ornamental plants, they can be applied up to the day of harvest.

EFFICIENT & MESS-FREE: The advanced formula targets adult slugs and snails, providing full control without leaving slimy residue. Ideal for gardens of all sizes, these pellets come in 800g and 400g options, ensuring a clean, pest-free garden throughout the year.

CONTINUED GROWTH: Backed by decades of expertise, Doff products are your trusted choice for thriving, healthy plants. Proudly made in the UK, our high-standard solutions provide safe and effective pest control to support your garden’s growth.
